---
title: "HW 4"
author: "Jordan Sutherland"
date: "3/19/2022"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

1a

```{r}
binom.test(14,36,0.5,alternative="less")
binom.test(22,36,0.5,alternative="greater")
```

1b

```{r}
binom.test(15,36,0.7,alternative="less")
binom.test(21,36,0.7,alternative="less")
```



3a

```{r}
pnorm(-4.2164,lower.tail=TRUE)
```

3c

```{r}
qnorm(0.045,lower.tail=TRUE)
qnorm(0.025,lower.tail=TRUE)
```
